items.subject: Event update: Apple/Everpass Integration Bi-Weekly
items.snippet: Event Update — Apple/Everpass Integration Bi-Weekly. Organizer: Daniel Hegeman. Location: Virtual Conference One-Time Room. Join: appleinc.webex.com

items.subject: Everpass - NESN/SNP
items.snippet: Ryan, hi. Any sense as to when we'll see a response?
items.urgency: HIGH — second chase; term sheet in NESN court since 4/12

items.subject: REMINDER TO STREAM | NBCUniversal Upfront: May 11th
items.snippet: Follow our social media accounts to stay connected. Upfront streaming May 11th.

items.subject: RE: DAZN catch up
items.snippet: No worries Ryan – pushed to tomorrow.

items.subject: Re: AccuWeather Check In
items.snippet: I want to check in to see if we can schedule a meeting to close out the remaining issues. Are you available for a call on Friday, 5/8 between 9:00am-10:30am PT? Or 12:30pm-1:30pm PT?
items.urgency: HIGH — executable draft 11 days overdue; Ryan owes Fri 5/8 confirm
